## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes (or `./scripts/check_all.sh` on macOS)
- [ ] No unintended functional behavior change (or called out explicitly)
- [ ] ADR updated if architecture contract changed
- [ ] Release docs updated if user-visible limitations shifted (`KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md`)
- [ ] Bridge/DTO changes include Swift + Python contract tests where applicable
